tryfishport.ui.ping.title: Server Route Tracing
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.windows.line1: - The tracert command should be built into Windows system
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.windows.line2: - Please confirm that you can execute the tracert command in the command prompt
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.windows.line3: - If it still cannot be used, please check the system environment variable settings
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.mac.line1: - The traceroute command should be built into macOS system
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.mac.line2: - Please confirm that you can execute the traceroute command in the terminal
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.mac.line3: - If it still cannot be used, please check system integrity or reinstall the system
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.linux.line1: - Some Linux distributions may not have traceroute tool pre-installed
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.linux.line2: - For Ubuntu/Debian systems, you can install it with the following command:
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.linux.line3: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install traceroute
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.linux.line4: - For CentOS/RHEL/Fedora systems, you can install it with the following command:
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.tip: Tip: You can also manually execute the following command in the system terminal to view routing information:
tryfishport.ui.ping.system.command.no_ou: Route tracing command executed successfully, but no output was returned
tryfishport.ui.unban.title: FishPort IP Self-Unban
tryfishport.ui.unban.ip.local: Local address (may not be a public IP)
tryfishport.ui.unban.result.request_succ: Unban request submitted, please check status later
tryfishport.ui.unban.result.captcha_fail: Unable to submit unban request: not banned or captcha not ready
tryfishport.log.button.copy: Copy result button clicked for server:
tryfishport.log.exception.button: Exception occurred while rendering TryFishport button
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.tryfishpo: A Minecraft client mod that test Fishport server
modmenu.summaryTranslation.tryfishport: Enhances Fishport server functionality for Minecraft clients
